name_en: In stock Fendi classic Baguette🔥, made with high-quality canvas craftsmanship. The whole bag features a double FF 3D embroidery texture that is amazing, paired with exquisite edging and small color blocking for a stylish look. The wide shoulder strap and flap design offer great practicality, with small details everywhere. Really love it~~ size 27×6×14cm
